channel.title: Checklist on KevinSec
channel.description: Recent content in Checklist on KevinSec

item.title: How to Recognize a Suspicious Email
item.description: A practical checklist for identifying suspicious emails, links, attachments, sender inconsistencies, and business process red flags.

item.title: JWT Security Testing Checklist
item.description: A practical checklist for testing JSON Web Token security in web applications and APIs.

item.title: Authentication Testing Checklist for Web Applications
item.description: A practical authentication testing checklist for web applications.
